image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Forces come in pairs — rockets push exhaust, exhaust pushes rockets.
Context visual: This is Newton's third law of motion. Every action has an equal and opposite reaction.
Escalation visual: Imagine a rocket in space. It expels gas downward and, boom, it shoots up!
Evidence visual: This principle explains not just rockets but swimming, walking, and even flying.
Payoff visual: So, every time you push off the ground, remember: you’re not just moving forward, you’re pushing against the Earth!
Cta visual: Want to explore more science concepts? Hit follow for more amazing insights!
